frontmatter.name: wp-elementor-ops
frontmatter.description: Safely audit and edit WordPress + Elementor sites - verify plugin/media usage before removing anything, edit shared Elementor templates without breaking other pages, and manage cache layers correctly.
frontmatter.author: moksa (https://moksaweb.com)

loaderBehaviour: Upload via Settings -> Skills -> Upload. Claude.ai parses SKILL.md frontmatter and surfaces the skill in your library. Tools that need a local Python runtime (audit-plugin-usage.py, audit-orphan-media.py) won't run in the sandbox since they expect SSH/WP-CLI access to a real site; use them from a local terminal instead.
uploadSteps: 3. Pick the generated zip; the skill appears in your library
4. New chats auto-invoke when you ask to audit/edit a WordPress + Elementor site
